title: Master Index Blueprint (Part 2)
normalized_content:
Phase 0.5A – Master Index Blueprint (Part 2)
Organization: Aetheris BioPharma Private Limited
Scope: Enterprise document repository index – Part 2 (Equipment, Products, Suppliers,
Training, Calibration, Maintenance, Batches, EM)
Date: 2026-07-11
Version: R0
10. Equipment Registry Index (05-Equipment)
Total equipment entries: ~250 (direct and indirect impact assets across PASH and VISK).
● Detailed equipment files: ~30 (with full calibration, maintenance, validation linkage).
● Indexed equipment: ~220 (metadata only).
Equipment ID format: EQ-[Area]-[Line]-[Seq] as defined in Phase 0.1.
